channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: House Prosecution Pushes for Access to Sara Duterte's Financial Records Amid Impeachment Trial
item.description: The House prosecution panel in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte is facing resistance from her defense team regarding the disclosure of her financial records. Panel member Benjamin ...

item.title: Cabo Verde Simplifies Entry Rules with Visa-Free Access, EASE Registration, and Visa-on-Arrival Options
item.description: Cabo Verde continues to promote international tourism by maintaining one of Africa's most accessible entry systems for foreign visitors. Citizens from the European Union, the Schengen Area, the United...

item.title: UN report reveals high pre-trial detention rates in Africa
item.description: A new United Nations report highlights that over a third (34%) of Africa's prison population is held without trial, with stark regional disparities. The study, titled 'Prison Matters 2026', found that...

item.title: Protesters clash with authorities over exam leaks and activist detention in India
item.description: The Indian government has prohibited a planned protest by the 'Cockroach' movement, which advocates against education minister Rajesh Sharma's alleged involvement in exam paper leaks. The movement gai...

item.title: Trump's Escalation in Iran Risks a Larger Regional Conflict
item.description: The article critiques Donald Trump's escalation of military strikes against Iran, arguing that the campaign has transformed a failed strategy into a perpetual cycle of conflict. Initial attacks aimed ...

item.title: Rising Foreclosures Create Opportunities for Bargain Hunters in 2026
item.description: Foreclosure rates in the U.S. reached their highest level since 2019 in the first half of 2026, with 228,000 homes facing foreclosure filings, up 21% from the previous year. This surge has created opp...

item.title: Victoria introduces demasking powers to combat online abuse
item.description: Victoria's Premier Jacinta Allan has announced new legal reforms aimed at protecting children from online abuse by requiring social media platforms to identify anonymous accounts engaged in harmful be...

item.title: ANC finalises mayoral candidates for local elections amid factional tensions
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) is finalising its list of mayoral candidates for the upcoming local government elections on November 4, with a focus on unifying party factions ahead of contentious...

item.title: World Cup 2026: Analysts Share Predictions For Upcoming Matches
item.description: The article discusses the latest predictions from political figures and analysts regarding the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Key topics include the potential matchups, host nations, and the impact of the tourn...

item.title: Understanding Stress, Anxiety, and Depression: When to Seek Professional Help
item.description: The article explores the distinctions between stress, anxiety, and depression, emphasizing the importance of recognizing symptoms and seeking timely professional assistance. It highlights that stress ...

item.title: Calgary police use Disney music to locate missing autistic boy
item.description: Calgary police are using Disney music played from patrol vehicles to locate an 11-year-old boy who is non-verbal, autistic, and has a history of being frightened by strangers. The boy, Parker, was las...

item.title: Electric Castle 2026: Highlights from Day Three Featuring Chase & Status, Yung Lean, Bladee, and Nothing But Thieves
item.description: The third day of Electric Castle 2026 delivered a lineup of electrifying performances, with Chase & Status closing the day with a set of UK dance classics, Yung Lean and Bladee collaborating on a Swed...

item.title: New Ambulance Solves Five-Year Referral Challenge at Tanzanian Health Centre
item.description: A new ambulance has been handed over to Shinyanga District Council, ending a five-year struggle for emergency referrals at Tinde Health Centre. The vehicle will exclusively serve emergency cases, with...

item.title: HiTech Group Australia to acquire troubled recruiter Hudson
item.description: Hudson Global Resources (Aust) Pty Ltd, a public sector recruitment firm burdened by debt, is poised to exit voluntary administration after months of negotiations. ASX-listed technology and recruitmen...

item.title: Windows 10 Still in Use Despite Security Risks
item.description: A recent report by Lansweeper reveals that Windows 10 remains on 16.9% of monitored devices, with small and medium-sized businesses (SMEs) accounting for 21.4% of remaining installations. The operatin...

item.title: Ryan Fox clinches British Open victory at final hole
item.description: Ryan Fox, a 39-year-old New Zealander, secured his place in golfing history by winning the 154th British Open at Royal Birkdale. The tournament, known for its intense competition, saw Fox overcome a t...

item.title: Marcos and Duterte Trust Ratings: Recent Survey Results Show Decline in Confidence
item.description: A recent Social Weather Stations (SWS) survey commissioned by Stratbase Group revealed that President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr.'s trust rating has declined to 34%, while Vice President Sara Dute...

item.title: Senior Citizen Dies in Jeep Collision in Manila
item.description: A senior citizen has died following a collision with a jeep in Manila, according to recent reports. The incident occurred on Quirino Avenue, where the victim was struck by a vehicle, leading to fatal ...

item.title: Israel's Torah Study Law and Its Role in National Unity
item.description: The article discusses Israel's recent Basic Law on Torah study, which aims to embed Jewish cultural and religious education into the national framework. It contrasts Israel's approach with Canada's se...

item.title: NBA 2026 Election Results: Badejo-Okusanya Wins Presidency
item.description: The Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) has officially released the results of its 2026 national elections, with Senior Advocate of Nigeria, Mrs. Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya, emerging as the 33rd President...
